path.description: Path is the path to the file or directory to delete. It is mutually exclusive with paths. When pathsAreGlobs is true, it is interpreted as a glob pattern.

paths.description: Paths is a list of paths to files or directories to delete. It is mutually exclusive with path. When pathsAreGlobs is true, each entry is interpreted as a glob pattern.

pathsAreGlobs.description: PathsAreGlobs causes path and paths to be treated as glob patterns instead of literal paths. Defaults to false.

strict.description: Strict will cause the directive to fail if a path does not exist or a glob pattern matches nothing.
